barRaise.topFinding: The durability gap that drove yesterday's needs-attention verdict is closed. Commit 477fb80 pushed the full v0.7.1 working tree, including the two autostart scripts and docs/ARCHITECTURE.md that defined the live deployment but had never been committed, so the running system is now reproducible from version control and the dashboard reads the deployed version. ARCHITECTURE.md also captures the tunnel id, config path, and Cloudflare Access policy, taking the remote-recovery gap down to low. What remains is polish: a port-only watchdog with no relaunch log, no in-app version pill, two stale .bak scripts, and DESIGN wording that still reads like the live remote path is pending review. Nothing loses data or exposes the machine. Next move is to cut a v1.0.0 tag.
